<thought>

<thought>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column D facing right. The cell ahead is a wall at row 02 column E, so I cannot move forward. The goal is below me at row 04 column D, and the safest next step is to turn clockwise to face down so I can move toward it next.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column D facing down. The cell ahead, row 04 column D, is the goal and is safe to enter, so I should move forward.
